# MoonCycles CoreDevice capabilities over the wireless (localNetwork) tunnel
# Captured 2026-07-04T17:41:30Z. Device UDID 00008140-0006491E2E90801C (iPhone 16 Pro Max, iOS 18.7.8).
# transportType: localNetwork (WiFi) — NO USB cable present (system_profiler SPUSBDataType shows no iPhone).

## PRESENT (lifecycle-control primitives the wireless tunnel exposes):
    • Device Orientation (com.apple.coredevice.feature.remote.devicecontrol.orientation)
    • Get Display Information (com.apple.coredevice.feature.getdisplayinfo)
    • Get Lock State (com.apple.coredevice.feature.getlockstate)
    • HID Button (com.apple.coredevice.feature.remote.hid.button)
    • HID Digitizer (com.apple.coredevice.feature.remote.hid.digitizer)
    • HID Keyboard (com.apple.coredevice.feature.remote.hid.keyboard)
    • HID Scroll (com.apple.coredevice.feature.remote.hid.scroll)
    • Launch Application (com.apple.coredevice.feature.launchapplication)
    • Monitor Process for Termination (com.apple.coredevice.feature.monitorprocesstermination)
    • Process Control (com.apple.coredevice.feature.processcontrol)
    • Reboot Device (com.apple.coredevice.feature.rebootdevice)
    • Send Memory Warning to Process (com.apple.coredevice.feature.sendmemorywarningtoprocess)
    • Send Signal to Process (com.apple.coredevice.feature.sendsignaltoprocess)
    • Start Media Stream (com.apple.coredevice.feature.startmediastream)
    • Start Video Output (com.apple.coredevice.feature.startvideooutput)
    • Uninstall Application (com.apple.coredevice.feature.uninstallapp)

## ABSENT over wireless (the blocker): com.apple.coredevice.feature.installapp — 'Install Application'
## devicectl install error was: CoreDeviceError 1001 (0x3E9) CapabilityFeatureIdentifier=com.apple.coredevice.feature.installapp
